zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Winterhay於大約1525年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特謝特諾爾時，她的父親Sir Giles Winterhay19歲，母親Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham16歲。她於1553年10月20日與John Miller在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克聖 尼拉希也 邱奇結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1580年在英國多瑟特享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Winterhay于大约1525年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特謝特諾爾时，她的父亲Sir Giles Winterhay19岁，母亲Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham16岁。她于1553年10月20日与John Miller在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克聖 尼拉希也 邱奇结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1580年在英国多瑟特享年56岁。

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Winterhay was born about 1525, in Chetnole, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Giles Winterhay, was 19 and her mother, Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham, was 16. She married John Miller on 20 October 1553, in St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1580, in Dorset, England, at the age of 56.

fr.St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshi: St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Winterhay est née environ 1525, à Chetnole, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Giles Winterhay, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John Miller le 20 octobre 1553, à St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1580, à Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Winterhay um 1525 in Chetnole, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Giles Winterhay 19 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham 16. Sie hat am 20. Oktober 1553 in St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshire, England John Miller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1580 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Winterhay è nata il circa 1525 nel Chetnole, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Giles Winterhay, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato John Miller il 20 ottobre 1553, nel St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1580, nel Dorset, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Winterhayが約1525年にイギリスイギリスドールセトチェトノルで生まれた時，父Sir Giles Winterhayは19歳，母Lady Isabella Jane Cockerhamは16歳であった。1553年10月20日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックスト ニチオラス' チャーチでJohn Millerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1580年にイギリスドールセトで56歳で死去した。

ko.St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshi: 영국 워윅실르 워윅 스트 닉홀아스' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Winterhay(이)가 대략 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 쳇노일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Giles Winterhay(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1553년 10월 20일 영국 워윅실르 워윅 스트 닉홀아스' 처르치에서 John Miller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1580년 영국 도르세트에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Winterhay nasceu aproximadamente 1525, em Chetnole, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Giles Winterhay, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com John Miller em 20 de outubro de 1553, em St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1580, em Dorset, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshi: ст ничолас' чурч, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Winterhay родилась около 1525 г. в местности четнол, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Giles Winterhay было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Miller 20 октября 1553 г. в местности ст ничолас' чурч, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1580 г. в местности дорсет, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.
